steps: Go to https://app.inngest.com and log in (or create a free account)
Click on 'Event Keys' to view and manage your event keys
Enter a name for the key (e.g., 'Production API Key')
Click 'Create' and copy the generated event key
For signing keys (used to verify Inngest requests to your app), go to Settings → Signing Keys

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Event Key
credential_fields.description: Your Inngest event key, used as a Bearer token to send events to the Inngest API

notes: Inngest has two types of keys: Event Keys (for sending events) and Signing Keys (for verifying requests from Inngest to your app)
Use Event Keys as the Bearer token when calling the Inngest REST API to send events
Event keys can be filtered by event name or source IP for security
Inngest offers a free tier with 50,000 function runs per month
Keep event keys separated per environment (production vs. staging) for easier management and rotation
Signing keys are environment-specific and found in Settings → Signing Key

test_endpoint.description: List all registered Inngest apps to verify the event key
